title: Idea Discovery And Research Question
description: Find topics, generate hypotheses, check novelty, and turn broad interests into researchable questions.
description_zh: 用于发现研究方向、生成假设、初步判断创新性，并把宽泛想法转化为可执行的研究问题。
queries: research ideation ai scientist hypothesis generation in:name,description,readme
research ideas literature discovery hypothesis in:name,description,readme

title: Literature Search And Reading
description: Search papers, build reading lists, summarize PDFs, and organize literature review inputs.
description_zh: 用于检索论文、整理阅读列表、总结 PDF，并为 related work 和综述搭建资料库。
queries: academic literature review arxiv semantic scholar in:name,description,readme
paper search literature review pubmed arxiv in:name,description,readme

title: Citation Management And Source Verification
description: Manage BibTeX, DOI metadata, citation graphs, references, and hallucination checks.
description_zh: 用于管理 BibTeX、DOI、参考文献元数据，检查引用错误、来源缺失和伪造引用风险。
queries: bibtex citation in:name,description,readme
zotero citation in:name,description,readme
doi crossref reference in:name,description,readme
bibliography references paper in:name,description,readme
citation reference academic in:name,description,readme

title: Experiment Execution And Reproducibility
description: Run experiments, track results, manage datasets, and keep work reproducible.
description_zh: 用于运行实验、记录结果、管理数据和模型版本，并保持论文实验可复现。
queries: mlflow wandb dvc sacred experiment tracking in:name,description,readme
reproducible research workflow experiment pipeline in:name,description,readme
machine learning experiment manager reproducibility in:name,description,readme

title: Analysis, Statistics, Figures And Tables
title_zh: 数据分析、统计、图表与表格
description: Analyze data, create publication-quality figures, tables, schematics, and statistical reports.
description_zh: 用于完成统计分析、可视化、论文级图表、表格和实验结果报告。
queries: scientific visualization publication figures matplotlib in:name,description,readme
publication quality plots statistics research paper in:name,description,readme

title: Paper Writing And Drafting
description: Draft abstracts, related work, methods, results, discussion, and full manuscripts.
description_zh: 用于撰写摘要、引言、相关工作、方法、结果、讨论以及完整论文初稿。
queries: academic paper writing latex docx ai in:name,description,readme
research paper writing skill manuscript in:name,description,readme

title: Peer Review, Self Review And Revision
description: Review manuscripts, score quality, generate rebuttals, and plan revisions.
description_zh: 用于模拟审稿、质量评分、发现论文缺陷、生成 rebuttal 和修改路线图。
queries: peer review academic paper reviewer in:name,description,readme
paper review rebuttal revision manuscript in:name,description,readme
manuscript review academic quality checklist in:name,description,readme

title: LaTeX, Word Formatting And Submission
description: Prepare LaTeX templates, DOCX/PDF exports, journal formatting, camera-ready packages, and submission checks.
description_zh: 用于准备 LaTeX/Word 模板、PDF/DOCX 导出、期刊会议格式检查和最终投稿包。
queries: latex template journal conference paper in:name,description,readme
docx latex paper submission template academic in:name,description,readme
overleaf latex manuscript template thesis in:name,description,readme
